Aussie Logistics Co.outreach_subject: AI agent idea for Aussie Logistics Co
Aussie Logistics Co.outreach_pitch:
Hey Aussie Logistics Co,

I noticed Aussie Logistics Co is hiring in Melbourne for operations automation covering manual reporting, support queue triage, invoice follow-up, CRM hygiene, and onboarding. It looks like there may be a workflow around manual reporting and support triage where an AI agent could help prepare summaries and route next actions for review.

A practical first build could be an Internal Ops Router, which would support the team while keeping human approval in place.

Worth a quick look?
Aussie Logistics Co.suggested_next_step: Human review, then decide whether this company is worth contacting.
Aussie Logistics Co.reasoning_summary: Outreach references the strongest hiring evidence and keeps the ask lightweight.
